description_long: This object appears to be a low-profile, rectangular combat tactical vehicle with a blocky, modular structure. The exterior is covered in a mottled, camouflage-like pattern with dark and light patches, suggesting an attempt at visual concealment. The surface is rough and uneven, with some protruding and recessed sections, possibly representing armor plating or modular panels. There are no clearly visible wheels, tracks, or weapon mounts, and the vehicle sits very close to the ground, giving it a squat, robust appearance. Some areas show what could be damage, burn marks, or heavy weathering, adding to its rugged, utilitarian look. The overall form is utilitarian and functional, with no visible windows, doors, or markings.
description: A blocky, low-profile combat tactical vehicle with a mottled camouflage pattern and rugged, modular exterior. The surface is rough and weathered, with no visible wheels, windows, or weapon mounts.
description_view_0: The vehicle's top and left side are visible, showing a patchy, camouflaged surface with some protruding sections and a dark, possibly damaged area on the right.
description_view_1: The rear and left side are shown, highlighting the blocky structure and a dark, rough patch extending from the back.
description_view_2: The top and rear are visible, with the mottled pattern and some recessed areas, as well as a protruding section on the right.
description_view_3: The front and right side are shown, with a prominent rectangular extension and a continuation of the camouflage pattern.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with blocky, modular panels; thickness and sloping are not clearly defined but appear robust and rugged.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Mottled camouflage pattern with brown, gray, black, and white patches in an irregular, organic style.
